channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Thompson-Herro fight leads to ejections of multiple players and coaches in Heat's victory in Houston
item.description: Rockets forward Amen Thompson threw Heat guard Tyler Herro to the floor to trigger an altercation that resulted in six ejections in the closing minute of Miami’s 104-100 victory over Houston on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Herro leads Heat over Rockets in game marred by fight and ejections in final minute
item.description: HOUSTON (AP) — Tyler Herro scored 27 points before being one of seven people ejected, six for their roles in a fight in the final minute of the Miami Heat's 104-100 victory over the Houston Rockets on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Darnold gives Vikings another gem with career-high 377 yards in 27-25 win over Packers
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The Minnesota Vikings were ready to start their postgame ritual in honor of a ninth consecutive victory before realizing Sam Darnold was still missing from the raucous locker room because he was finishing his interview with the TV broadcasting crew.
item.dc:creator: DAVE CAMPBELL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NFC's No. 1 seed comes down to Vikings-Lions showdown at Detroit in Week 18
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed will come down to the final week when the Detroit Lions host the Minnesota Vikings. The winner takes the NFC North and gets a first-round playoff bye and home-field advantage until the Super Bowl. The loser becomes the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Moment of silence for former President Jimmy Carter held before the Falcons-Commanders game
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — Jimmy Carter was honored with a moment of silence before the Atlanta Falcons’ game at the Washington Commanders on Sunday night, hours after the 39th president of the United States died at the age of 100 in Plains, Georgia.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Crosby breaks Lemieux's Penguins career assists record in 3-2 victory over the Islanders
item.description: Sidney Crosby broke Mario Lemieux’s Pittsburgh franchise career record for assists on Michael Bunting’s power-play goal and the Penguins beat the New York Islanders 3-2 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Dan Scifo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Hanna Cavinder praises boyfriend Carson Beck as Georgia star declares for NFL Draft
item.description: Hanna Cavinder, the Miami Hurricanes guard and social media sensation, congratulated her boyfriend, Georgia quarterback Carson Beck, on declaring for the 2025 NFL Draft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Monday Night Football game vs. 49ers no longer matters for Detroit Lions
item.description: Here's why the Monday Night Football game between the Detroit Lions and the San Francisco 49ers no longer matters to the playoff picture.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Bills clinch the AFC's No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the undisciplined Jets
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Josh Allen reflected on Buffalo’s many offseason critics and doubters when asked about the Bills achieving their latest milestones while sewing up the AFC’s No. 2 seed with a 40-14 rout of the unraveling and undisciplined New York Jets on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Nick Sirianni wore the hat given to NFC East champions as he sat at the podium and considered all the greatness that his Eagles still could accomplish this season. Personal goals, sure. Saquon Barkley has Eric Dickerson's NFL rushing record in sight. Team goals, absolutely.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mayfield throws 5 TD passes and Bucs keep playoff, NFC South hopes alive with 48-14 rout of Panthers
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Tampa Bay Buccaneers played like a team determined to do whatever's necessary to make the playoffs.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing and moves within 100 of Dickerson's record
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley normally would have tossed his game-used cleats to the kid who asked for the pair as the star Philadelphia Eagles running back ran off the field and back to the locker room. Sorry, kid. Not today.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dontae Walker, former Mississippi State star running back, dead at 44
item.description: Former Mississippi State Bulldogs running back Dontae Walker has died, the school announced on Saturday. He was 44. He ran for more than 1,800 yards in his collegiate career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Aaron Rodgers sets dreadful NFL record as Jets crushed against Bills
item.description: New York Jets star quarterback Aaron Rodgers was sacked for an NFL record 568th time in his career on Sunday against the Buffalo Bills.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: East Carolina-NC State fight mars end of Military Bowl, ref left bloodied
item.description: The Military Bowl between the East Carolina Pirates and the N.C. State Wolfpack ended with a massive brawl that led to the ejections of eight players.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: LeBron James at 40: A milestone birthday arrives Monday for the NBA's all-time scoring leader
item.description: When LeBron James broke another NBA record earlier this month, the one for most regular-season minutes played in a career, his Los Angeles Lakers teammates handled the moment in typical locker room fashion. “They told me I’m old as hell,” James quipped.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Draymond Green turns profane hot mic moment into lesson in Warriors leadership
item.description: Draymond Green lit into Buddy Hield during the Warriors' win over the Suns, but there's a method to his madness.
item.dc:creator: Danny Emerman, The Mercury News

item.title: Rams inch closer to winning division with gritty victory over Cardinals
item.description: It wasn't a pretty performance by the offense, but it was enough for the Los Angeles Rams to take home a victory over the Arizona Cardinals.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Colorado football fans face a dramatic week across three teams
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Colorado football fans experienced a week filled with high-stakes action, featuring the Denver Broncos chasing a playoff berth and the Colorado Buffaloes and Colorado State Rams battling in bowl games.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Miami teammates fight on sideline during Pop-Tarts Bowl
item.description: A pair of Miami Hurricanes teammates were separated during an altercation Saturday at the Pop-Tarts Bowl against the Iowa State Cyclones in Orlando.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chicago brings losing streak into matchup with Dallas
item.description: Dallas Stars (20-13-1, in the Central Division) vs. Chicago Blackhawks (12-22-2, in the Central Division) Chicago; Sunday, 8:30 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks look to break their three-game skid when they play the Dallas Stars.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ahead of 2025, WWE Champion Cody Rhodes talks balancing fatherhood and wrestling's biggest stage
item.description: Heading into 2025, Cody Rhodes reflects on his epic year and sets new goals for fatherhood and WrestleMania 41 in Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, Fox 5

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bears vs Seahawks Preview: Inactives, Caleb Williams' development and a shot at the wrong kind of history
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — For the last time this season, the Chicago Bears will take to Soldier Field with a bit of dubious history on the line. The Bears (4-11) are losers of nine straight and will take on a Seattle Seahawks squad (8-7) who's playoff hopes dangle in the balance.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: DIRECTV Holiday Bowl: What to know before going
item.description: It will be the first time the Holiday Bowl is held in Mission Valley — where it had been for more than 40 years — since before the pandemic. The two most recent bowl games were played in Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Reports: Pete Carroll interested in Bears' head-coaching job
item.description: Former Seattle Seahawks head coach Pete Carroll has expressed interest in becoming the next head coach of the Chicago Bears, who are looking to fill their head coaching vacancy for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: USF beats SJSU 41-39 in the Hawaii Bowl when Mac Harris knocks down a pass in the 5th overtime
item.description: Bryce Archie found Keshaun Singleton over the middle to give South Florida the lead in the fifth overtime and Mac Harris batted down a pass in the end zone to give the Bulls a 41-39 victory over San Jose State on Tuesday night in the Hawaii Bowl.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Breaking: Dave Fleming leaves CMU after 20 years
item.description: "I thank Coach Fleming for all his dedication and hard work at CMU," Colorado Mesa Athletic Director Joan McDermott said in a press release. "He is not only a great coach, but a special person and will be greatly missed.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Kiser, KREX 5

item.title: Why Netflix is streaming NFL games on Christmas Day
item.description: To make the events even more enthralling, Mariah Carey is set to perform ahead of kick-off while Beyoncé is taking over halftime of the Ravens-Texans game.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation
